# find-primordials/no-spread-syntax

📝 Disallow runtime usage of spread syntax.

💼 This rule is enabled in the 🌐 `all` config.

<!-- end auto-generated rule header -->

## Options

<!-- begin auto-generated rule options list -->

| Name                 | Description                            | Type    | Default |
| :------------------- | :------------------------------------- | :------ | :------ |
| `ignoreArraySpread`  | Ignore array spread syntax ([...arr])  | Boolean | `false` |
| `ignoreObjectSpread` | Ignore object spread syntax ({...obj}) | Boolean | `false` |

<!-- end auto-generated rule options list -->
